title: No. of Occurrences
text: No. of Occurrences Number of occurrences allowed. For parameters of type entity or occurrence , you can specify a fixed number of occurrences from 1 through 2147483647. Description Alternatively, for all implementations except C, you can enter an asterisk (*) to retrieve all occurrences. However, you cannot combine both a number and an asterisk, for example, 5*. Applies To Signature Parameter Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
